title: lycopodium castoris
intro: Lycopodium castoris, also known as Lycopodium clavatum, is a type of club moss plant that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its spores. The health benefits of Lycopodium clavatum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Lycopodium clavatum is commonly prepared as a tincture or dried powder for use in herbal remedies, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
